events.title: Martin's Connection Circle
events.description:
Please join us for a great networking opportunity. A small group dedicated to learning more about each other so that we can provide better referrals.

We will be meeting in the Chamber offices starting at 8AM. We should be finished by about 9AM. Coffee and a small pastry will be provided.

Please RSVP so that sufficient coffee and snacks will be prepared. You can reach me via email at martin.carman@synapticsystems.biz or by phone at (818) 710-0647

Hope to see you there!

events.title: June 3rd ~ ~Start Your Month With a Motivating and Fun Breakfast at Corbin Bowl
events.description:
Thank you to our Sponsor:

Hornstein Law Offices -Steve Hornstein

West Valley~Warner Center Chamber of Commerce Breakfast~

Not Your Typical Boring Meeting!

Wednesday, June 3rd at 7 AM

Location: Corbin Bowl

19616 Ventura Blvd.

Tarzana, CA 91356

Head count is very important to the venue,

so please RSVP by Noon on Friday, May 29th!

Prepaid Members  $35, One-time Prepaid Trial Guests $45

Click Here To Sign Up

Accurate head counts are imperative as our venues are running a tight margin.

The amount of food they provide and the labor used is determined by our headcount!

There will be assigned seating.

Thank you to our sponsor:

Steve Hornstein graduated from UCLA with a degree in Economics/Business. After receiving a law degree from Loyola Law School and passing the California Bar exam, he went on to receive his LL.M. in taxation from Goldengate University while working at the accounting firm Deloitte and Touche, LLP. Steve is a Certified Financial Planner(TM) licensee.  Steve has an insurance license and is also a Certified Public Accountant.

At Hornstein Law Offices, Steve is highly involved in both Estate Planning and Tax Preparation.  Being an attorney and a CPA, Steve balances his time between the two.  Focusing on taxes during the beginning of the year and then concentrating on the law after tax season ends in April.

20335 VENTURA bLVD., #203

Woodland Hills, CA 91364

818.887.9401

Toll Free: 888.280.8100

Sponsored By:

events.title: Dynamic Business Networking (DBN)
events.description:
We invite you to join our Dynamic Business Networking Connection Circle, convening monthly on the 2nd Monday.

Our goal is to connect vibrant business owners seeking to advance their business and create a referral network, friendships, and advocacy. We integrate business with social activities like hiking and picnicking, promoting camaraderie. Please contact me to determine if your business category is available. We would be delighted to have you join us, with the understanding that membership requires an active Chamber membership, although visitors are welcome.

If you are interested to joining, please email or call me to find out if your Category is available. Thank you!

events.title: Gala July 25th ~ 6 PM Black, White & Bold!
events.description:
We can't wait to see you!

A high-energy, celebratory evening marking the official Installation of the Chamber of Commerce 2026–2027 Board of Directors. This signature event blends tradition with fun, bringing together business leaders, elected officials, sponsors, and community partners for a night of connection, celebration, and purpose.

Sponsor Now for Immediate Recognition!!

With an anticipated 200 guests, it is an outstanding networking opportunity and a great way to meet people in your local community. Be Sure to get your tickets. The West Valley Warner Center Chamber of Commerce is known for having some of the nicest members and most fun paties in town! See you soon.

Los Angeles Cancer Network

Los Angeles Cancer Network (soon to be known as Oncura Health) is a community-based, multi-specialty oncology group dedicated to delivering compassionate, coordinated cancer and specialty care close to home. While our name is evolving, our mission remains the same - to deliver compassionate, innovative cancer and specialty care close to home.

Our Clinical Specialties

events.title: 20th Annual Food and Wine Event. Public is welcome.
events.description:
SAVE THE DATE!

The 20th Annual Food & Wine Signature Event hosted by the West Valley~Warner Center Chamber of Commerce is back — and you won't want to miss it!

Join us for an unforgettable evening filled with delicious tastings from local restaurants, exceptional wines, exciting networking, and the elegance of luxury automobiles all under one roof. This signature event is a favorite tradition that brings together business leaders, community members, and friends for a night of flavor, fun, and connection.

Mark your calendars now — Click here to sign up

We're looking forward to raising a glass, saying hello to familiar faces, and making wonderful new connections. Cheers to great food, great wine, and even greater company!

Date & Location:

September 16, 2026 | Doors Open at 5:30 PM

Jaguar Land Rover Woodland Hills

22006 Erwin Street, Woodland Hills, CA

UCLA Health is among the most comprehensive and advanced health care systems

in the world. We strive to provide the best patient experience with every patient,

every encounter, every time.

Our mission is to provide state-of-the-art patient care, generate research discoveries leading to new treatments and diagnoses, and train future generations of health care professionals.

We offer an integrated network of Primary & Specialty Care services at more than 280 clinics across Southern California and the central coast and at five medical centers including the

UCLA West Valley Medical Center.

events.title: October 17th ~ LIGHT THE NIGHT Walk
events.description:
Experience Light the Night

About Light The Night

At Blood Cancer United's Light The Night, we gather as a community to celebrate, honor, and remember those touched by blood cancer. Companies, community partners, friends, families, and sponsors join together to instill hope and bring light to the darkness of cancer. The dollars raised by this community fund life-saving blood cancer research around the world, provide free information and support services, and help advocate for access to quality, affordable, coordinated care for patients and their families.

Family, friends, and supporters gather together to celebrate, honor, and remember people affected by blood cancer. Registration is free! Join us and raise funds to support our mission. Stay tuned for more information on how you can get involved and donate.

Event Details

Saturday, October 17, 2026

Time:  5:00 pm

Location: Warner Center Park

5800 Topanga Canyon Blvd

Woodland Hills, CA 91367

The Leukemia & Lymphoma Society (LLS) is now Blood Cancer United
